'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 11''' was the eleventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 13]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Jim Swallow]], [[Chris Gardner]], and [[Iain Lowson]]. It also featured original artwork by [[Carl Lyons]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] {{C|END 7-10}}
**<small>The [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] trap on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon]] was carefully prepared.</small>
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] {{C|YOD 1-6}}
**<small>The wise Jedi Master who sat on the Council.</small>
*[[Garindan/Legends|Garindan]] {{C|GAR 1-4}}
**<small>The mysterious [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] informer who haunted the streets of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]</small>
*Planets of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] {{C|PLA 7-8}}
**<small>The planets close to the Core were once at the edge of known space.</small>
*R3 & R4 [[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech Droids]] {{C|AST 2-4}}
**<small>Two of the important series of droids used by most starships.</small>
*[[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Booma/Legends|Weapons]] {{C|GUN 1-2}}
**<small>Organic technology created the weapons used by the Gungans of Naboo.</small>
*[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] {{C|STA 3-4}}
**<small>Mighty vessel of war that symbolized the Empire's Dominance of space.</small>

==Development==
The Garidan article includes orriginal artwork by [[Carl Lyons]] depicting Garidan.<ref name="Issue" />
